$comment: Hand-edited control-plane config. Drives scripts/generate-status.mjs. Edit this file (and the per-package ROADMAP/CHANGELOG) to update what STATUS.md shows.
next_actions: schema-v0.8.0 shipped (PR #28, tag schema-v0.8.0 at ec742e8). Active target placeholder: v0.9+. No implementation has started; no phase plan exists yet.

If a migration runner / apply path is proposed for v0.9, raise it as a separate plan-only PR with thesis-fit audit. The v0.8 hard-locks (no apply in @nekostack/schema, forward-only, one schemaId per migration, no DDL) remain in force regardless of what v0.9 picks up.
Apply the thesis-fit audit gate to any v0.9 phase plan before any implementation PR.
